CustomField.description: concats several details used as 2nd line info in lookups
CustomField.formula: LEFT(Email & " / " & TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) & " / " & Username & " / " & fxProfileName__c & " / " & fxRoleName__c & " / " & fxUserId18__c ,255)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: concats several details used as 2nd line info in lookups
CustomField.label: fxUserInfo
